sentences.target: Je sors rarement le soir en semaine.
sentences.reading: /ʒə sɔʁ ʁaʁ.mɑ̃ lə swaʁ ɑ̃ səmɛn/

translations.fr: Je sors rarement le soir en semaine.
translations.ipa: /ʒə sɔʁ ʁaʁ.mɑ̃ lə swaʁ ɑ̃ səmɛn/
translations.en: I rarely go out on weeknights.
translations.es: Casi nunca salgo por las noches entre semana.
translations.de: Unter der Woche gehe ich abends selten aus.
translations.it: Esco raramente la sera nei giorni feriali.
translations.ru: По будням я редко выхожу вечером.
translations.pt: Eu raramente saio à noite durante a semana.
translations.he: אני כמעט לא יוצא בערבים בימי חול.
translations.tr: Hafta içi akşamları nadiren dışarı çıkarım.
translations.vi: Tôi hiếm khi ra ngoài vào các tối trong tuần.
translations.ar: نادرًا ما أخرج في أمسيات أيام الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Doordeweeks ga ik ’s avonds zelden uit.
translations.uk: У будні я рідко виходжу ввечері.
translations.hi: मैं सप्ताह के दिनों की रातों में शायद ही बाहर जाता हूँ।
translations.el: Τις καθημερινές βγαίνω σπάνια τα βράδια.
translations.nb: Jeg går sjelden ut på hverdagskvelder.
translations.id: Saya jarang keluar pada malam hari di hari kerja.
translations.sv: Jag går sällan ut på vardagskvällar.
translations.ro: Ies rar seara în timpul săptămânii.
translations.cs: Ve všední dny večer chodím ven jen zřídka.
translations.da: Jeg går sjældent ud på hverdagsaftener.
translations.ja: 平日の夜はめったに出かけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the main verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate meaning ‘to go out’, modified by the adverb ‘rarement’.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb ‘sors’, indicating low frequency of the action.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the noun ‘soir’ in the nominal group ‘le soir’.
Common noun denoting time of day; part of a temporal complement (‘le soir’).
Preposition introducing the temporal prepositional phrase ‘en semaine’ (‘during the week’).
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase ‘en semaine’, specifying the habitual time frame.

sentences.target: Tu cuisines rarement à la maison.

translations.fr: Tu cuisines rarement à la maison.
translations.vi: Bạn hiếm khi nấu ăn ở nhà.
translations.hi: तुम घर पर शायद ही कभी खाना बनाते हो।
translations.ja: 家ではめったに料理しない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; main predicate meaning ‘to cook’, modified by ‘rarement’.
Adverb of frequency modifying ‘cuisines’, indicating infrequent action.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase ‘à la maison’ (‘at home’).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun ‘maison’.
Common noun; head of the locative complement ‘à la maison’.

sentences.target: Elle prend rarement le bus le matin.
sentences.reading: /ɛl pʁɑ̃ ʁaʁ.mɑ̃ lə bys lə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Elle prend rarement le bus le matin.
translations.ipa: /ɛl pʁɑ̃ ʁaʁ.mɑ̃ lə bys lə matɛ̃/
translations.en: She rarely takes the bus in the morning.
translations.es: Ella rara vez toma el autobús por la mañana.
translations.de: Sie nimmt morgens selten den Bus.
translations.it: Lei prende raramente l'autobus la mattina.
translations.ru: По утрам она редко ездит на автобусе.
translations.pt: Ela raramente pega o ônibus de manhã.
translations.he: היא כמעט לא נוסעת באוטובוס בבוקר.
translations.vi: Cô ấy hiếm khi đi xe buýt vào buổi sáng.
translations.ar: نادرًا ما تستقل الحافلة في الصباح.
translations.nl: Zij neemt ’s ochtends zelden de bus.
translations.hi: वह सुबह बस बहुत कम लेती है।
translations.el: Το πρωί παίρνει σπάνια το λεωφορείο.
translations.nb: Hun tar sjelden bussen om morgenen.
translations.id: Dia jarang naik bus pada pagi hari.
translations.sv: Hon tar sällan bussen på morgonen.
translations.da: Hun tager sjældent bussen om morgenen.
translations.ja: 彼女は朝はめったにバスに乗らない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate meaning ‘to take’, here selecting a direct object (‘le bus’).
Adverb of frequency modifying ‘prend’.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘bus’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘prend’ (‘take the bus’).
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘matin’ in the temporal NP ‘le matin’.
Common noun; temporal complement (‘in the morning’, generic/habitual time).

sentences.target: Ils voyagent rarement avec les enfants.

translations.fr: Ils voyagent rarement avec les enfants.
translations.en: They rarely travel with the kids.
translations.es: Rara vez viajan con los niños.
translations.de: Sie reisen selten mit den Kindern.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们很少带着孩子一起旅行。
translations.yue: 佢哋好少同啲小朋友一齊去旅行。
translations.pt: Eles raramente viajam com as crianças.
translations.he: הם כמעט לא נוסעים עם הילדים.
translations.vi: Họ hiếm khi đi du lịch cùng बọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Ze reizen zelden met de kinderen.
translations.hi: वे बच्चों के साथ शायद ही यात्रा करते हैं।
translations.ja: 彼らは子どもと一緒に旅行することはめったにない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate meaning ‘to travel’, modified by ‘rarement’.
Adverb of frequency modifying ‘voyagent’.
Preposition introducing a comitative prepositional phrase (‘with’ someone).
Definite article, plural; determiner of ‘enfants’.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition ‘avec’ (companions in travel).
